mari 2022/06/15 0:41

0:41

iamjesstay 2022/06/15 0:41
Microfreak?
mari 2022/06/15 0:41
Yee
iamjesstay 2022/06/15 0:41
Oh then what do ya think about it, I had some thoughts about buying it the other day
mari 2022/06/15 0:47
I like it and it sounds super nice, I have a guitar pedal I use with it for multi fx, but honestly sometimes I just forget I have it and just use serum or phaseplant
iamjesstay 2022/06/15 0:47
yea that's a problem
0:47
especially when you got used to Serum
0:48
it's like an automatic go-to (edited)
mari
I like it and it sounds super nice, I have a guitar pedal I use with it for multi fx, but honestly sometimes I just forget I have it and just use serum or phaseplant
iamjesstay 2022/06/15 0:48
guitar pedals with synths is some cool stuff ngl
mari 2022/06/15 0:48
Mm ye but then like every synth is super similar it’s just different interface, i more so just am so demotivated all the time that setting it up is like too much, but also you can use it without your pc so sometimes I just lay in bed and sound design on it
iamjesstay 2022/06/15 0:49
wow that's nice
mari
I use this it’s basically hardware serum @iamjesstay
Scythe 2022/06/16 6:20
I've heard really good things about the microfreak, but would you recommended it over getting serum? I know it's kinda comparing apples to oranges but I'm curious (edited)
the_mad_duck 2022/06/16 6:28
I use Serum literally every day but feel free to get more opinions I've haven't found an electronic sound Serum CAN'T make yet, but do read the manual if you want it to make sense. If you are a student as well, just send proof you are a student for a discount that knocks it down to about $135 USD.
6:29
It's also light as hell on computers, really fast
Scythe
I've heard really good things about the microfreak, but would you recommended it over getting serum? I know it's kinda comparing apples to oranges but I'm curious (edited)
mari 2022/06/16 7:05
I would get serum or vital instead vital is free, or you could pay monthly for serum on splice which is what I did
the_mad_duck
I use Serum literally every day but feel free to get more opinions I've haven't found an electronic sound Serum CAN'T make yet, but do read the manual if you want it to make sense. If you are a student as well, just send proof you are a student for a discount that knocks it down to about $135 USD.
mari 2022/06/16 7:06
Sometimes serum has like a distinct papery sound with the fm and stuff phaseplant is more versatile and more osc options I use phaseplant more than anything tbh
the_mad_duck 2022/06/16 7:38
Tbh the papery sound is kinda just how fm is but alright
mari 2022/06/16 9:11
Serums yeah but in phaseplant with phase modulation it sounds a lot better imo
9:11
Plus with using snapheap and multi pass you can literally have like all your post in just one thing
9:11
It’s OP

23:38

3:03

4:43

一番の姫女子
Exporting the project is impossible, FL crashes instantly..
the_mad_duck 2022/06/17 4:52
could be a license error or something, people who have taken my plugins have issues if they don't compile it from the source
4:53
I've written two of my own plugins and another is on the way, I was hoping to get noticed by Cymatics actually since they use JUCE
4:53
maybe if 01* is willing to give out the source code you can compile it

4:53
